name: What if my boss fires me after I file for work illness in West Valley City?
description: Illegal retaliation; sue for wrongful termination.[9]

mainEntity.name: What if my boss fires me after I file for work illness in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Illegal retaliation; sue for wrongful termination.[9]
acceptedAnswer.description: Utah prohibits retaliation for workers' comp claims; file wrongful discharge suit if fired.[9] Protected activity includes filing or seeking benefits.[9] Key factors: (1) timing link to claim; (2) no legit reason; (3) damages proof. Document everything, report to Labor Commission. Lawyer pursues reinstatement/backpay. Strong protections exist.
